text: Working hub for the Mobilite Plateau consultation cycle April 6 2026 through October 15 2026. Anchor event is the final public consultation at Centre communautaire du Plateau.

In scope corridors are Rue Saint Denis protected bike lane segment, Boulevard Saint Laurent north pedestrian priority zone review, Avenue du Mont Royal transit stop redesign, Rue Rachel bike corridor extension, and Rue Saint Joseph pilot.
